memoryArtifacts.headline: Origin of Clan Lindsay

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford於1387年出生在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾克勞福德時，他的父親David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawford28歲，母親Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland25歲。他於1404年與Lady Majory Dunbar在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾克勞福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1446年1月13日在蘇格蘭Forfarshire分哈文享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford于1387年出生在英国苏格兰藍納可爾克勞福德时，他的父亲David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawford28岁，母亲Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland25岁。他于1404年与Lady Majory Dunbar在英国苏格兰藍納可爾克勞福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1446年1月13日在苏格兰Forfarshire分哈文享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lindsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

variants.name: Linzy
meanings: Altered form of Scottish, Irish, or English   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  . Compare   Lenzy  .

variants.name: Linzey
meanings: English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .

variants.name: Lindsey
meanings: Irish: shortened and Anglicized form of various Gaelic surnames, as for example Ó Loingsigh (see Lynch 1), Mac Giolla Fhionntóg (see McClintock ), and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn and Lynn ).

variants.name: Lincoln
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Lincoln, so named from an original British name Lindo- ‘lake’ + Latin colonia ‘settlement, colony’. The place was an important administrative center during the Roman occupation of Britain and in the Middle Ages it was a center for the manufacture of cloth, including the famous ‘Lincoln green’.
African American: adoption of the surname in 1 above, in honor of Abraham Lincoln, the 16th president of the US, who abolished slavery.
History: Abraham Lincoln (1809–65), 16th president of the US, was the son of an illiterate laborer, descended from Samuel Lincoln, who had emigrated from England to MA in 1637.

variants.name: Linsey
meanings: Scottish, Irish, or English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .
Americanized form of German Linse or Swiss German Linsi, see Lins .

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford was born in 1387, in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawford, was 28 and his mother, Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland, was 25. He married Lady Majory Dunbar in 1404, in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 13 January 1446, in Finhaven, Forfarshire, Scotland, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford est né en 1387, à Crawford, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawford, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lady Majory Dunbar en 1404, à Crawford, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 13 janvier 1446, à Finhaven, Forfarshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford 1387 in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawford 28 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland 25. Er hat 1404 in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Lady Majory Dunbar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 13. Januar 1446 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Finhaven, Forfarshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford è nato il nel 1387 nel Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawford, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Lady Majory Dunbar nel 1404, nel Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 13 gennaio 1446, nel Finhaven, Forfarshire, Scotland, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawfordが1387年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアクラウフォードで生まれた時，父David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawfordは28歳，母Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotlandは25歳であった。1404年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアクラウフォードでLady Majory Dunbarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1446年1月13日にスコットランドForfarshireフィンヘイベンで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford(이)가 1387년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 크롤퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawford(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1404년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 크롤퍼드에서 Lady Majory Dunbar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1446년 1월 13일 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 핑하븐에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford nasceu em 1387, em Crawford, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawford, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Majory Dunbar em 1404, em Crawford, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de janeiro de 1446, em Finhaven, Forfarshire, Scotland, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford родился в 1387 г. в местности кравфорд, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawford было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Majory Dunbar в 1404 г. в местности кравфорд, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 13 января 1446 г. в местности финавен, Forfarshire, Шотландия в возрасте 59 лет.

Se casó con Lady Majory Dunbar en 1404, en Crawford, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas.
